title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 524.290 - Action for damages may be maintained, when
text:
524.290.  Action for damages may be maintained, when. — An action for damages may be maintained in all the cases enumerated in section 524.020.
(RSMo 1939 § 1558) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1394; 1919 § 1844; 1909 § 2411
